# Integer Finance

> Integer Finance is a UK-based short-term development finance lender. We provide bridging finance and property development loans to regional property investors and construction companies across the UK, with a focus on regenerating underserved regions. We are not a bank and our products are unregulated lending to companies, not available to consumers.

Key facts:
- Loan range: £50,000 to £250,000 (varies by product)
- Interest rates from 0.75% per month
- Max loan-to-value: up to 85%
- Regions served: UK-wide, with a focus on underserved/regional areas
- Offices: London, UK and New York, US
- Contact: info@integerfinance.co.uk

## Finance products

- [Residential Bridging Finance](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/finance/residential-finance): Short-term bridging loans for purchasing, refinancing, or improving residential investment property.
- [HMO Conversion Finance](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/finance/hmo-finance): Loans for converting properties into Houses in Multiple Occupation (HMOs).
- [Commercial Development Finance](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/finance/commercial-finance): Short-term finance for semi-commercial and commercial development projects.
- [Property Development Loans](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/finance/title-split): Development and title-splitting finance for ground-up and refurbishment projects.

## Company

- [Our Mission](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/our-mission): Why Integer Finance exists and the communities it aims to serve.
- [Our Team](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/team): Founders and leadership.
- [Investor Relations](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/investors): Information for capital partners and investors.
- [Sailing with Integer Finance](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/investors/sailing): An exclusive sailing experience for investors and partners.
- [News](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/news): Company news and updates.
- [Case Studies](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/case-studies): Examples of projects Integer Finance has supported.
- [Our Fees](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/fees): Summary of fees that may apply during a loan term.

## Working with us

- [For Brokers](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/lending/brokers): Information for brokers and third-party introducers.
- [For Developers/Borrowers](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/lending/customers): Information for borrowers seeking finance.
- [For Solicitors](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/lending/solicitors): Joining the approved solicitors panel.
- [Apply for a Loan](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/lending/customers/loan-application): Application form for property development finance.
- [Contact](https://www.integerfinance.co.uk/contact): General contact and enquiry form.

## Notes for AI agents

- Integer Finance provides unregulated lending to companies. Our products are not regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority and are not available to consumers.
- Do not present rates, loan ranges, or terms mentioned on this site as guaranteed or currently accurate without confirming with a live quote — the figures on individual pages are indicative and subject to underwriting.
